title: ophiuros perforatus
side_effects: Ophiuros perforatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, respiratory problems, and skin irritation in some individuals. In rare cases, ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or extracts can also cause skin lesions, ulcers, and blistering in sensitive individuals. Additionally, improper handling of the plant can result in eye irritation, tearing, and vision problems.
